description: Provisions enterprise applications in Entra ID: OIDC web apps (authorization_code flow), SAML SSO apps, service/M2M apps (client_credentials), and linked SSO portal links. Each app gets both an App Registration and Service Principal.

risk_profile_effects.standard: No risk profile variation — app provisioning is configuration-driven.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: No risk profile variation — app provisioning is configuration-driven.
risk_profile_effects.strict: No risk profile variation — app provisioning is configuration-driven.

oidc_apps.label: OIDC Web Applications
oidc_apps.client_description: Web applications using OpenID Connect (authorization code flow) for authentication. Provide display name, redirect URIs (where Entra ID sends tokens after sign-in), and optionally a logout URL.

saml_apps.label: SAML Applications
saml_apps.client_description: Enterprise applications using SAML for single sign-on. Provide display name, sign-on URL, identifier URIs (entity ID), and reply URLs (ACS endpoint).

service_apps.label: Service / M2M Applications
service_apps.client_description: Machine-to-machine applications using client credentials (no user interaction). Used for API integrations, automation, and background services. A client secret is automatically generated.

linked_sso_apps.label: Linked SSO Applications
linked_sso_apps.client_description: Portal links to external applications with their own authentication. Shows up in the My Apps portal as a bookmark. No Entra ID SSO — just a link.

outputs.oidc_app_ids: Map of OIDC app name to application (client) ID
outputs.oidc_object_ids: Map of OIDC app name to object ID
outputs.saml_app_ids: Map of SAML app name to application (client) ID
outputs.saml_object_ids: Map of SAML app name to object ID
outputs.service_app_ids: Map of service app name to application (client) ID
outputs.service_app_secrets: Map of service app name to client secret (sensitive)
